originalTitle: Wall Street ends lower as AI spending concerns mount
summary: STORY: A down day on Wall Street Tuesday saw the Dow edge lower, while the S&P 500 tumbled nearly one-and-a-half percent and the tech-heavy Nasdaq plummeted about 2.2%. Jitters over debt-funded AI spending led to sharp losses in semiconductor and other Big Tech tech stocks. :: Marvell Technology Shares of Nvidia dropped more than 4%, Intel shed over 6% and shares of Marvell Technology tumbled more than 9%. Memory chipmakers Micron Technology and SanDisk, among the best performers on the S&P 500 this year, both fell around 13%. Micron's earnings report on Wednesday will draw intense scrutiny, says Nancy Tengler, CEO and chief investment officer at Laffer Tengler Investments. "So I think this is a hugely important report, much like Nvidia has been in other periods. [FLASH] We're gonna be watching their guidance on HBM4, which is the Vera Rubin platform Nvidia relationship that they have - is that continuing to grow quickly? And then margins. The company pulled, reported 81% margins. I mean, imagine that - eighty-one percent. And the market is determined that they stay above eighty [percent]. So, those are the two things we'll be paying attention to." Among other movers, Elon Musk's SpaceX, which debuted this month, continued its bumpy ride, briefly dipping below its opening price of $150 before paring losses to close about 1% higher. Investors on Tuesday were also watching developments in the Middle East. The Senate backed legislation to halt U.S. military action against Iran, but ‌it was unclear how this would affect the war as Washington continues to negotiate a peace agreement with Tehran.

Jitters over debt-funded AI spending led to sharp losses in semiconductor and other Big Tech tech stocks. :: Marvell Technology Shares of Nvidia dropped more than 4%, Intel shed over 6% and shares of Marvell Technology tumbled more than 9%. Memory chipmakers Micron Technology and SanDisk, among the best performers on the S&P 500 this year, both fell around 13%. Micron's earnings report on Wednesday will draw intense scrutiny, says Nancy Tengler, CEO and chief investment officer at Laffer Tengler Investments. "So I think this is a hugely important report, much like Nvidia has been in other periods. [FLASH] We're gonna be watching their guidance on HBM4, which is the Vera Rubin platform Nvidia relationship that they have - is that continuing to grow quickly? And then margins. The company pulled, reported 81% margins. I mean, imagine that - eighty-one percent. And the market is determined that they stay above eighty [percent]. So, those are the two things we'll be paying attention to." Among other movers, Elon Musk's SpaceX, which debuted this month, continued its bumpy ride, briefly dipping below its opening price of $150 before paring losses to close about 1% higher. Investors on Tuesday were also watching developments in the Middle East. The Senate backed legislation to halt U.S. military action against Iran, but ‌it was unclear how this would affect the war as Washington continues to negotiate a peace agreement with Tehran.
chineseTitle: 随着 AI 支出担忧加剧，华尔街收低
chineseSummary: 故事：周二华尔街下跌，道琼斯指数小幅走低，标准普尔 500 指数下跌近 1.5%，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数暴跌约 2.2%。对债务资助的人工智能支出的不安导致半导体和其他大型科技股大幅下跌。 Nvidia Marvell Technology 股价下跌超过 4%，Intel 下跌超过 6%，Marvell Technology 股价下跌超过 9%。内存芯片制造商美光科技 (Micron Technology) 和闪迪 (SanDisk) 是今年标准普尔 500 指数中表现最好的公司，股价均下跌 13% 左右。 Laffer Tengler Investments 首席执行官兼首席投资官 Nancy Tengler 表示，美光周三发布的收益报告将受到严格审查。 “所以我认为这是一份非常重要的报告，就像 Nvidia 在其他时期所做的那样。[FLASH]我们将关注他们对 HBM4 的指导，这是他们与 Vera Rubin 平台 Nvidia 的关系 - 是否会继续快速增长？然后是利润率。该公司拉升，报告利润率为 81％。我的意思是，想象一下 - 百分之八十一。市场决定他们保持在百分之八十以上。所以，这是我们将要做的两件事关注”。在其他推动因素中，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 于本月首次亮相，继续其坎坷旅程，一度跌破 150 美元的开盘价，然后收复失地，收盘上涨约 1%。周二投资者也在关注中东的事态发展。参议院支持停止美国对伊朗采取军事行动的立法，但目前尚不清楚这将如何影响战争，因为华盛顿仍在与德黑兰谈判和平协议。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
